subcodes.first_line: The Book proclaimeth with most exalted call: O ye that have turned away! This is the Day of acceptance; deprive not yourselves behind the veils [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب باعلی الندآء میگوید ای معرضین یوم اقبالست خود را محروم منمائید در حجج
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @suffering and imprisonment, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
